name: Scheduler

parameters.name: NowIndicator
parameters.description: Show the current-time indicator line in time-grid views. Default: true. Maps to FullCalendar's nowIndicator option.

parameters.name: SlotMinTime
parameters.description: Earliest visible time slot in time-grid views (e.g. 07:00). Maps to FullCalendar's slotMinTime. Default: 00:00 (FullCalendar shows the full day).

parameters.name: SlotMaxTime
parameters.description: Latest visible time slot in time-grid views (e.g. 22:00). Maps to FullCalendar's slotMaxTime. Default: 24:00 (FullCalendar shows the full day).

parameters.name: SlotDuration
parameters.description: Duration of each time slot row in time-grid views. Maps to FullCalendar's slotDuration (formatted as HH:mm:ss). Default: 00:30:00.

parameters.name: Resources
parameters.description: Optional list of resources (people, rooms, equipment). When provided, events are color-coded by their ResourceId and a legend is rendered above the calendar. Note: this uses Lumeo's color-coding fallback, NOT FullCalendar Premium resource lanes (which require a paid FullCalendar Premium license not bundled here).

parameters.name: EventClassNames
parameters.description: Optional callback that returns extra CSS class names for an event chip. The classes are appended to the FullCalendar event's classNames. Use for conditional styling without touching Color.

parameters.name: EventColor
parameters.description: Optional callback that returns a CSS color string for an event. Applied as backgroundColor / borderColor in FullCalendar. Supersedes Color when both are set; resource color applies as a fallback when neither is set.

examples.title: Click to Create
examples.code:
<Scheduler Events="_events"
           InitialView="SchedulerView.Week"
           OnDateSelect="HandleDateSelect" />

<Dialog @bind-Open="_open">
    <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader><DialogTitle>New event</DialogTitle></DialogHeader>
        <Input @bind-Value="_title" placeholder="Title" />
        <DialogFooter>
            <Button OnClick="Add">Add event</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

@code {
    private bool _open;
    private SchedulerDateRange? _range;
    private string _title = "";
    private List<SchedulerEvent> _events = new();

    void HandleDateSelect(SchedulerDateRange r) { _range = r; _open = true; }
    void Add() {
        _events = _events.Append(new SchedulerEvent(
            Id: Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"),
            Title: _title,
            Start: _range!.Start,
            End: _range.End,
            AllDay: _range.AllDay
        )).ToList();
        _open = false;
    }
}

mdSummary:
# Scheduler

Calendar/agenda scheduler wrapping FullCalendar.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Scheduler` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/scheduler

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Scheduler | Events | `IEnumerable<SchedulerEvent>?` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | EventsChanged | `EventCallback<IEnumerable<SchedulerEvent>>` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | InitialView | `SchedulerView` | `SchedulerView.Month` |  |
| Scheduler | InitialDate | `DateTime?` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | Editable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Scheduler | Selectable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Scheduler | BusinessHours | `bool` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | Height | `string` | `"640px"` |  |
| Scheduler | FirstDayOfWeek | `int` | `1` |  |
| Scheduler | OnEventClick | `EventCallback<SchedulerEvent>` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | OnDateSelect | `EventCallback<SchedulerDateRange>` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | OnEventChange | `EventCallback<SchedulerEvent>` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | NowIndicator | `bool` | `true` | Show the current-time indicator line in time-grid views. Default: true. Maps to FullCalendar's nowIndicator option. |
| Scheduler | SlotMinTime | `TimeOnly?` | `` | Earliest visible time slot in time-grid views (e.g. 07:00). Maps to FullCalendar's slotMinTime. Default: 00:00 (FullCalendar shows the full day). |
| Scheduler | SlotMaxTime | `TimeOnly?` | `` | Latest visible time slot in time-grid views (e.g. 22:00). Maps to FullCalendar's slotMaxTime. Default: 24:00 (FullCalendar shows the full day). |
| Scheduler | SlotDuration | `TimeSpan?` | `` | Duration of each time slot row in time-grid views. Maps to FullCalendar's slotDuration (formatted as HH:mm:ss). Default: 00:30:00. |
| Scheduler | Resources | `IReadOnlyList<SchedulerResource>?` | `` | Optional list of resources (people, rooms, equipment). When provided, events are color-coded by their ResourceId and a legend is rendered above the calendar. Note: this uses Lumeo's color-coding fallback, NOT FullCalendar Premium resource lanes (which require a paid FullCalendar Premium license not bundled here). |
| Scheduler | EventClassNames | `Func<SchedulerEvent, string>?` | `` | Optional callback that returns extra CSS class names for an event chip. The classes are appended to the FullCalendar event's classNames. Use for conditional styling without touching Color. |
| Scheduler | EventColor | `Func<SchedulerEvent, string>?` | `` | Optional callback that returns a CSS color string for an event. Applied as backgroundColor / borderColor in FullCalendar. Supersedes Color when both are set; resource color applies as a fallback when neither is set. |
| Scheduler | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Scheduler | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `EventsChanged` (`EventCallback<IEnumerable<SchedulerEvent>>`)
- `OnEventClick` (`EventCallback<SchedulerEvent>`)
- `OnDateSelect` (`EventCallback<SchedulerDateRange>`)
- `OnEventChange` (`EventCallback<SchedulerEvent>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Scheduler />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Scheduler/Scheduler.razor`
- `UI/Scheduler/SchedulerTypes.cs`
